A roadmap for industrial AI

RCAI Framework

A practical, sector-tested framework for taking AI from idea to implementation in industrial and manufacturing environments.

[This is the page to explain your RCAI Framework in your own words. Replace the placeholder structure below with the real methodology.]

What RCAI stands for

[Spell out the acronym and the idea behind it — e.g. Readiness, Capability, AI, Implementation — replace with your actual framework.]

Why it exists

Most manufacturing organizations don’t fail at AI because of the technology — they fail because there’s no structured path from interest to execution. RCAI gives operations and reliability teams that path.

The four stages

  1. [Stage 1 name] — [one or two sentences on what happens here]
  2. [Stage 2 name] — [description]
  3. [Stage 3 name] — [description]
  4. [Stage 4 name] — [description]
